---
pagetitle: "BNR Information Hub"
page-layout: full
title-block-style: none
toc: false
---

::: {.bnr-landing}

::: {.bnr-hero-banner style="background-image: url('assets/images/bnr-hero1.jpg');"}
::: {.bnr-hero-content}
<p class="bnr-kicker">The Barbados National Registry</p>

# Data for Impact
:::
:::

::: {.bnr-home-section .bnr-intro-section}

<p class="bnr-intro-main">We track major chronic diseases and primary care indicators to understand Barbados’ changing health burden.</p>

<p class="bnr-intro-sub">With clear, reliable evidence, we help guide decisions that strengthen care and improve health outcomes.</p>

::: {.d-flex .gap-3 .justify-content-center .flex-wrap .mt-4 .bnr-home-actions}
[View latest data](latest/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Explore surveillance areas](#surveillance-areas){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

:::

::: {.bnr-home-section #surveillance-areas}

## Surveillance areas

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### Cardiovascular disease {.card-title}

Tracking heart attacks and strokes helps show how disease burden and outcomes are changing across Barbados.

[Open CVD surveillance](surveillance/cvd/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
 
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### Hypertension {.card-title}

Monitoring hypertension in primary care helps show how common risk is being detected, treated, and controlled.

[Open hypertension surveillance](surveillance/hypertension/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}

### Diabetes {.card-title}

Following diabetes care helps show how people are being monitored, supported, and protected from long-term complications.

[Open diabetes surveillance](surveillance/diabetes/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

:::
:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.bnr-home-section .bnr-utility-section}
::: {.bnr-utility-card}

## Understanding the numbers

We publish methods, definitions, data notes, and release updates so users can understand how BNR information is produced and how it should be interpreted.

::: {.bnr-utility-links}
[Methods and definitions](./methods/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[Data sources](./downloads/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[Quality checks](./operations/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[Release notes](./downloads/release-catalogue.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

:::
:::
